name: bsv-language-server
description: Bluespec SystemVerilog Language Server for VSCode

bsv.languageServer.path.description: Path to the BSV language server executable. If empty, the extension will try to find it.

bsv.languageServer.trace.server.description: Traces the communication between VSCode and the language server.

scripts.copy:server:linux-x64: mkdir -p server/linux-x64 && cp target/x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu/release/bsv-language-server server/linux-x64/ && chmod +x server/linux-x64/bsv-language-server
scripts.copy:server:linux-arm64: mkdir -p server/linux-arm64 && cp target/aarch64-unknown-linux-gnu/release/bsv-language-server server/linux-arm64/ && chmod +x server/linux-arm64/bsv-language-server
scripts.copy:server:darwin-x64: mkdir -p server/darwin-x64 && cp target/x86_64-apple-darwin/release/bsv-language-server server/darwin-x64/ && chmod +x server/darwin-x64/bsv-language-server
scripts.copy:server:darwin-arm64: mkdir -p server/darwin-arm64 && cp target/aarch64-apple-darwin/release/bsv-language-server server/darwin-arm64/ && chmod +x server/darwin-arm64/bsv-language-server
scripts.copy:all-servers: npm run copy:server:linux-x64 && npm run copy:server:linux-arm64 && npm run copy:server:darwin-x64 && npm run copy:server:darwin-arm64 && npm run copy:server:win32-x64 && npm run copy:server:win32-arm64
scripts.build:all-servers: npm run build:server:linux-x64 && npm run build:server:linux-arm64 && npm run build:server:darwin-x64 && npm run build:server:darwin-arm64 && npm run build:server:win32-x64 && npm run build:server:win32-arm64
scripts.build:extension: npm run compile && npm run build:server && npm run copy:server
scripts.build:extension:all-platforms: npm run compile && npm run build:all-servers && npm run copy:all-servers
scripts.package:all-platforms: npm run compile && npm run copy:all-servers && npx vsce package --dependencies --allow-missing-repository --skip-license --out bsv-language-server-all-platforms.vsix
